overview: Business website for Saif Surgical & Scientific Equipment — a trusted supplier of surgical instruments, laboratory equipment, and scientific tools based in Anand, Gujarat. The site generates inbound calls and WhatsApp leads, showcases expertise in operation theatre setup, and is SEO-optimized for local Gujarat search.
features: 6-page responsive website (Home, About, Products, Contact, Get Quote, Quote Submitted)
WhatsApp quote form that pre-fills and sends inquiry directly to business WhatsApp
Floating WhatsApp button and sticky mobile call bar for instant contact
Expertise and trust sections highlighting 25+ completed operation theatres
Product showcase across 4 categories with 12 products
Google Maps embed with business location in Anand, Gujarat
Mobile-first design with SEO meta tags for local Gujarat keywords
Custom branded footer with no platform branding
